case_title: MICHAEL MANLEY ET AL VS. CHARLES TAYLOR

docket_entries.description: ORDER OF EXAMINATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MANLEY, MICHAEL MADRIGAL, RAY (W/POWER OF ATTORNEY)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-01-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-01-2023 BY JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL MANLEY IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF RAY MADRIGAL (W/POWER OF ATTORNEY) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHARLES TAYLOR IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT CHARLES TAYLOR WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF RAY MADRIGAL AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, PER REQUEST OF THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL MANLEY IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF RAY MADRIGAL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHARLES TAYLOR IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STATED THE JUDGMENT HAS BEEN SATISFIED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARGARET WU; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MANLEY, MICHAEL MADRIGAL, RAY (W/POWER OF ATTORNEY) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAYLOR, CHARLES MR. $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,075.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-01-2023 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MANLEY, MICHAEL MADRIGAL, RAY (W/POWER OF ATTORNEY) AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR, CHARLES MR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-01-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR, CHARLES MR. HEARING SET FOR JAN-18-2024 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
